# GEONYX GROUP

> GEONYX GROUP LTD. is a Bulgarian manufacturer of patented geopolymer systems for industrial floor protection, critical infrastructure, and heavy industry. GEONYX is not a paint or epoxy — it is an inorganic mineral matrix with a guaranteed service life of 20+ years.

## About the Company

GEONYX GROUP LTD. (VAT: BG206972055) is based in Gabrovo, Bulgaria and operates across 8+ active markets in Europe and beyond. The company develops, manufactures, and installs advanced geopolymer coating and flooring systems for use in environments where conventional materials fail: extreme mechanical loads, aggressive chemistry, high temperatures, hydrostatic pressure, and biogenic corrosion.

GEONYX systems are certified to ISO 9001 and ISO 14001, and hold HACCP declarations of performance.

## Products

### GEONYX ARMOR — Mechanical Resistance System
Industrial floor system for extreme abrasion, impact, and concentrated loads. Compressive strength ≥110 N/mm². Hardness MOHS 9. Wear resistance AR ≤0.5 (DIN 52108). Fire class A1. Service life ≥20 years.
Use cases: mines, logistics warehouses, foundries, VNA aisles, heavy machinery halls, aviation hangars, railway depots.

### GEONYX CHEM — Chemical Protection System
Geopolymer system for floors and surfaces exposed to aggressive chemicals: strong acids, strong bases (lyes), solvents, oils, disinfectants, biogenic H2SO4. Resistant to pH 0–14.
Use cases: chemical plants, food & pharma facilities, battery manufacturing, textile and dyeing, fuel warehouses.

### GEONYX THERM — Thermal Safety System
Non-combustible geopolymer system for environments with high temperatures, thermal shock, molten metal splashes, and fire risk. Temperature resistance up to 800°C. Fire class A1fl.
Use cases: foundries, steel plants, energy facilities, substations, combined heat and power plants.

### GEONYX HYDRO — Hydraulic Protection System
100% watertight geopolymer system for surfaces under hydrostatic pressure, water immersion, biogenic corrosion in sewage, and chloride-rich marine environments. Resistant to carbonation and osmotic pressure.
Use cases: sewage collectors, drinking water tanks, water parks, coastal reinforcement, tunnels, underground structures.

## Industry Sectors

- **Heavy Industry & Logistics** — warehouses, logistics hubs, loading zones, VNA aisles
- **Food, Beverages & Pharma** — HACCP-compliant hygiene floors, cleanrooms, production areas
- **Agriculture & Biogas** — manure channels, fermenters, silage areas, compost zones
- **Water & Marine Infrastructure** — sewage plants, marine structures, water parks
- **Energy & Defense** — substations, CHP plants, battery parks, military bunkers
- **Transport & Parking** — ramps, parking structures, TIR zones, automotive workshops
- **Construction & Architecture** — UHPC urban furniture, facades, architectural concrete
- **Urban & High-Tech Zones** — ESD floors, gigafactories, cleanrooms, data centers

## Licensing & Technology Transfer

GEONYX patented geopolymer formulas are available for:
- **IP Licensing** — produce GEONYX systems under license in your territory
- **Technology Transfer** — full production process transfer adapted to local raw materials
- **Joint Ventures** — for airports, ports, industrial zones, and large-scale infrastructure projects

Minimum project volume for joint ventures: 50,000 m² installed area.

## Technical Resources

- Technical Data Sheets (TDS) and MSDS available for all 4 systems
- CAD & BIM library available in .DWG and Revit format
- Certificates: ISO 9001, ISO 14001, HACCP, CE Declarations of Performance
- System Selector tool available at geonyxgroup.com for specification matching
